svg.title: Nav Alert Context To DCM Request Response Observation Signal Flow

g.text: Nav Alert Context To DCM Request Response Observation Signal Flow
(nav/session + alert context -> DCM diagnostic request/response observation seams)
1. Navigation and alert context reach DCM
2. DCM combines them with boundary and fail-safe state
3. DCM derives diagnostic stage and request/response posture
4. DCM publishes request/response observation seams on Diag
